title: TS LAWCET Hall Ticket 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: TS LAWCET Hall Ticket 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: TS LAWCET Hall Ticket 2026 released for 3-year and 5-year LLB entrance exam on the official website - lawcet.tgche.ac.in on 12 May 2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the TS LAWCET 2026 hall ticket using your registration number and date of birth.

content.text: Telangana State Law Common Entrance Test (TS LAWCET) authorities have officially released the TS LAWCET Hall Ticket 2026 for candidates appearing in the 3-year LLB and 5-year LLB entrance exam for the 2026-27 academic session. The admit card has been made available online for all registered candidates whose applications have been accepted.

TS LAWCET Hall Ticket 2026 has been released online on the official website - lawcet.tgche.ac.in. Candidates can download their TS LAWCET 2026 admit card by logging in with their registration number, date of birth and mobile number on the official portal. The hall ticket carries key details such as candidate name, roll number, exam date and time, allotted test centre and important exam day instructions, and it is mandatory to carry a printed copy to the exam hall. After downloading, students are advised to carefully verify all details mentioned on the admit card and immediately contact the exam authorities in case of any discrepancy for necessary corrections before the exam day.
Download Here: TS LAWCET Hall Ticket 2026

sections.heading: TS LAWCET Hall Ticket 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: TS LAWCET Hall Ticket 2026 is now live for law aspirants appearing for the Telangana State Law Common Entrance Test for admission into 3-year and 5-year LLB programmes. The admit cards have been released online for the 2026 session, and candidates can access them through the official portal using their registration credentials to download and print the hall ticket for reference on exam day.

rows: TS LAWCET Hall Ticket 2026 Release Date

sections.heading: TS LAWCET Hall Ticket 2026 Direct Link

content.text: The exam authorities have activated the TS LAWCET Hall Ticket 2026 direct link on the official portal for all registered candidates. Aspirants of both 3-year and 5-year LLB courses can use the direct link given below to access the login page and download their admit card instantly using their registration details. Candidates must ensure they download and print the hall ticket well before the exam date to avoid last-minute technical issues or server load.

rows: TS LAWCET Hall Ticket 2026 - 3-Year and 5-Year LLB

sections.heading: How to Download TS LAWCET Hall Ticket 2026

content.text: Candidates can follow the simple, step-by-step process given below to download their TS LAWCET 2026 hall ticket from the official website.

items: Visit the official TS LAWCET website at lawcet.tgche.ac.in.
On the homepage, click on the "Download Hall Ticket" or "TS LAWCET Hall Ticket 2026" link.
You will be redirected to the TS LAWCET 2026 hall ticket login page.
Enter your registration number, date of birth and mobile number in the required fields.
Click on the "Submit" or "Download Hall Ticket" button to proceed.
Your TS LAWCET Hall Ticket 2026 will appear on the screen with all your exam details.
Carefully check your name, photograph, signature, exam date, shift, and exam centre details mentioned on the admit card.
Download the TS LAWCET 2026 hall ticket in PDF format and take 1-2 clear printouts on A4 size paper to carry on exam day.
